author: fwyzard
body: #### PR description: Add explicit compression levels of HDF5 conditions payloads: - zlib from 1 to 9, - lzma from 1 to 9, - zstd from -9 to -1, 1 to 19, and 20 to 22 Here is an example of the compression ratio vs dumping time: #### PR validation: Extracted the content of an online global tag for a single run using ```bash conddb2hdf5.py --run 402360 160X_dataRun3_HLT_v1 --output .160X_dataRun3_HLT_v1.hdf5 --compressor xxxx --level nn ``` for all supported compressors and compression level, and tested that CMSSW can read back some of them at random.
title: Add explicit compression levels of HDF5 conditions payloads
